basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Anganwadi Helpers and Workers Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi has released the official Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) & Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) Recruitment 2026 Notification. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced under the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 37 years with qualifications ranging from 8th Pass, Matriculation, 10+2, to Graduation can apply through offline mode. The last date to submit the application form is 11 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Anganwadi Workers: Domicile of UT of J&K Women candidates in the age group of 18-37 years Resident of the electoral Ward where Anganwadi Centre is situated Minimum qualification: 10+2 Maximum qualification: Graduation Anganwadi Helpers: Domicile of UT of J&K Women candidates in the age group of 18-37 years Selection restricted to the electoral ward where Anganwadi Centre is located Minimum qualification: Matriculation If no matriculate candidate available, candidates with qualification not less than 8th standard shall be considered

selection_process: Prescribed Performa in Annexure "A" Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JK Anganwadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Anganwadi Workers: Domicile of UT of J&K Women candidates in the age group of 18-37 years Resident of the electoral Ward where Anganwadi Centre is situated Minimum qualification: 10+2 Maximum qualification: Graduation Anganwadi Helpers: Domicile of UT of J&K Women candidates in the age group of 18-37 years Selection restricted to the electoral ward where Anganwadi Centre is located Minimum qualification: Matriculation If no matriculate candidate available, candidates with qualification not less than 8th standard shall be considered

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 11 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for the posts of Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) and Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) in the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Anganwadi Helpers?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for Anganwadi Helpers is Matriculation. However, if no matriculate candidate is available, candidates with a qualification not less than 8th standard will be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JK Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts in the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is between 18 to 37 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for these posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for these posts will be paid on an honorarium basis. Specific details regarding the honorarium amount are usually provided in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify this in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Who is eligible to apply for the Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates for Anganwadi Worker posts must be a domicile of UT of J&K, women aged between 18-37 years, a resident of the electoral ward where the Anganwadi Centre is situated, and possess a qualification between 10+2 and Graduation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi. The link to the official website is provided in the Important Links section.
